title: Accounting Associate
description: The Coca-Cola Company seeks an Accounting Associate for our Miami distribution and logistics hub. You will support accounts payable processing, manage supplier invoices, reconcile expense reports, and assist with month-end close activities. This role is essential to maintaining the financial accuracy and operational rhythm of one of our largest regional operations.
responsibilities: Process supplier invoices and match to purchase orders and receiving documents
Reconcile accounts payable subledger and investigate aging exceptions
Review and approve employee expense reports for policy compliance
Prepare monthly journal entries for distribution center operations and logistics costs
Assist in bank reconciliation and identify discrepancies with finance team oversight
Support external audit preparation by organizing supporting documentation

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business Administration
skills: Attention to detail in transaction recording
certifications: None required; CPA or CPA candidate status a plus

benefits: Comprehensive benefits package including medical, dental, and vision
Coca-Cola stock purchase plan with discount
Professional development and accounting course support
On-site cafeteria with subsidized meals and beverages
